name: P4C-FC Chatbox Continuous Dialogue Acceptance
goal: Verify the local/mock Chatbox can support free multi-turn dialogue, workspace status queries, explicit tool execution, session restore, and responsive evidence without claiming real external-provider acceptance.
targetArchitecture: Chatbox UI stays a thin browser client for conversation, uploads, mode/provider status, and artifact display.
Chat Session State stores user and assistant messages for restore after refresh.
Chat Intent Router separates free local dialogue, status/next-step replies, and explicit domain tool intents.
Domain Tools write artifacts only for explicit profile, JD, package, or interview requests.
Provider-backed free chat remains a later opt-in path and is not used by this default local/mock acceptance.
currentImplementation: React/Vite Chatbox initializes a local workspace and chat session through FastAPI.
KeywordChatCore handles local deterministic free dialogue and tool routing.
Workspace artifacts and chat messages are persisted in the local SQLite workspace.
Browser automation uses Chrome DevTools Protocol screenshots and clears viewport emulation at the end.
The UI labels the default privacy boundary as local/mock and external model not called.
acceptanceCriteria: The first free-chat turn produces an assistant reply and no artifact rail is required.
A second follow-up can continue the conversation without forced tool execution.
A status query returns the current workspace state without writing a new artifact.
Only an explicit profile request generates a career facts artifact.
Refreshing the page restores the previous conversation.
Desktop and mobile screenshots are captured from the actual running UI.
The report does not claim human acceptance, real personal-data acceptance, or real external-provider acceptance.

prdReview.requirement: P4C-FC: at least two free follow-up turns without forced artifact writes.
prdReview.evidence: Desktop screenshots show free-chat first turn and follow-up before explicit tool execution.

prdReview.requirement: P4 Gate 2: status/next-step questions should return understandable workspace replies.
prdReview.evidence: Status-query screenshot waits for current workspace summary text.

prdReview.requirement: P4 Gate 2: explicit tool intent still generates the expected artifact.
prdReview.evidence: Explicit profile request waits for career facts text and captures artifact/workbench state.

prdReview.requirement: P4 Gate 4: provider and privacy semantics must not mislead.
prdReview.evidence: Header and context panel state local/mock default and external model not called.

prdReview.requirement: P4 final gate requires human experience review.
prdReview.evidence: This report is automated browser evidence only.

unverifiedScope: No real external provider call was made.
No real personal profile or raw private data was used.
No ASR, meeting platform, automatic job application, SaaS login, billing, or multi-tenant path was tested.
This report does not replace the user's human experience review.
auditOpinion: Automated acceptance may support P4C-FC local/mock readiness only if all steps pass and screenshots match the actual UI. Any provider-backed or real-data claim remains blocked until separate confirmation and acceptance.

steps.name: Fill follow-up question
steps.value: 继续，我下一步应该先补 React 还是项目经历？

steps.name: Fill status query
steps.value: 当前进展如何？有哪些产物？

steps.name: Wait for status summary
steps.text: 当前还没有生成求职产物

steps.name: Fill explicit profile request
steps.value: 请整理资料，生成职业事实。

steps.name: Wait for restored conversation
steps.text: 请整理资料，生成职业事实
